title: URL Space Traps, Structural Fingerprints, Soft Errors, and Stop Evidence
description: Calendars, facets, search pages, sessions, sort orders, repeated path segments, and soft errors create limitless unique keys under the page cap. Learners cumulatively produce trap detection and bounded containment policy through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Detect temporal, pagination, facet, search, session, nonce, sort, repeated-segment, depth, and parameter-combination expansion.
Bound distinct path templates, query keys, values, combinations, depths, and pages per class with owned exceptions.
Combine status, redirect, title, main text, structure, known markers, and repetition to classify soft error and challenge pages.
